items.name: ⚫ Shadow Monarch Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Walk between light and darkness with this sleek monochrome coat. Designed with layered fabrics, metallic trims, and flowing details, it captures the aura of a modern sorcerer or elite assassin. The realistic PBR materials give it a cold, reflective finish that stands out in any world.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Stylish black-and-silver color scheme
Layered asymmetrical design with elegant flow
PBR textures for metallic shine and fabric realism
Perfect for mystic, cyberpunk, or dark fantasy avatars
🔍 Keywords: shadow, dark, coat, sorcerer, assassin, futuristic, silver, monochrome, Roblox
Rule the shadows — and look flawless doing it ⚔️

items.name: 💜 Neo Phantom Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Step out of the shadows in the Neo Phantom Coat, a jet-black trench traced with luminous violet energy lines. Designed for those who walk between worlds — digital and real — this outfit radiates mystery and high-tech mastery.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Dark futuristic coat with glowing purple accents
⚡ Sleek, minimal silhouette that exudes authority and edge
✨ PBR materials create realistic shine and texture contrast
💀 Perfect for hackers, void mages, or cyber assassins
🔍 Keywords: black, purple, neon, coat, cyberpunk, futuristic, trench, PBR, tech, Roblox
Disappear into the digital night —
the Neo Phantom Coat leaves only a trail of violet light. 💫
